title: dev-pipeline configuration
description: Configuration file for the Claude Code dev-pipeline plugin. Place as pipeline.config.json in your repo root or .claude/ directory.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE autocompletion

specialists.description: Configure which specialist skills are available and when they trigger

defaults.description: Specialists that always run on review commands

filePatterns.description: Map glob patterns to specialists. Used by 'review all' to dispatch the right specialist per file.

issues.description: Configure issue discovery and branch creation

label.description: GitHub label used to find issues for automation

branchPrefix.description: Prefix for branches created by solve-issue (e.g. fix/42-description)

autoAssign.description: Automatically assign the issue to the current user when solving

maxParallel.description: Maximum number of parallel agents for batch-issues

quality.description: Configure which quality gates are enforced

requireTests.description: Run test suite before allowing stop

requireBuild.description: Run build before marking task complete

maxFileReviewSize.description: Maximum lines per file to review (larger files get a warning)
